tam.source: Grand View Research (2024) — Global Digital Dietitian Market valued at $1.49B in 2024; corroborated by Fundamental Business Insights ($1.67B in 2025) and MetaTech Insights ($1.61B in 2024)

sam.source: LATAM represents ~5-7% of global digital health market (MarketDataForecast); LATAM telehealth at $5.05B (Grand View Research 2023); nutrition-specific segment estimated at ~6% of telehealth = ~$300M

som.source: Conservative 2-3% of SAM for $1B-$10B range; adjusted to 2% given early-stage marketplace in fragmented LATAM market with regulatory complexity; SOM = $300M × 2% × 5-year ramp = ~$30M achievable in first 3 years

growth_source: Grand View Research — Digital Dietitian Market Report 2024-2030; corroborated by LATAM digital health CAGR of 20.05% (MarketDataForecast 2024-2033) and AI meal planning CAGR of 24-28% (Market.us, TBRC)

early_adopters.segment: Independent nutritionists/dietitians in LATAM using digital platforms (Doctoralia, AgendaPro)
early_adopters.evidence_of_spending: Pay $25-69/month for Practice Better, Healthie, NutriAdmin, Nutrium; Doctoralia Pro subscription for patient acquisition; 12+ paid tools identified in problem validation

reachable_channels.name: Congreso Iberoamericano de Nutrición (Colegio Mexicano de Nutriólogos)

early_adopters.segment: Health-conscious urban millennials in LATAM metros (Mexico City, São Paulo, Buenos Aires, Bogotá) seeking online nutrition consultations
early_adopters.evidence_of_spending: Doctoralia has 330,000+ professionals in Mexico alone; LATAM digital health market $12.82B (2024); nutrition app spending growing at 13-16% CAGR; consumers pay for Noom, MyFitnessPal premium, and similar apps

reachable_channels.name: r/nutricion_mexico and similar Spanish-language health subreddits
Doctoralia patient platform (Mexico, Colombia, Argentina, Chile)

early_adopters.segment: Fitness-focused consumers and gym-goers in Brazil and Mexico seeking personalized diet plans
early_adopters.evidence_of_spending: Brazil fitness market one of largest globally; consumers pay for MyFitnessPal, Yazio, HealthifyMe; gym membership rates high in urban LATAM; AI meal planning app market at $972M globally (2024)

reachable_channels.name: V Congreso Latinoamericano de Nutrición Funcional
